description: Simmons meets Abby and tries to gently coach her through her struggles to control her new Inhuman abilities. Abby, afraid for her family if she fails the ceremony, is comforted by Simmons' compassion and encouragement, and accepts Simmons' offer to help her master her powers. Their connection is emotional and supportive.

transcript.line: And everyone else is on a space walk. But there's no time to explain. They're tracking me. You shouldn't be seen here. You should go.
That's a great idea. Let's go.
I can't. I need to stay. The thing I stole from the Kree guard, boss man has it in his office, but I think I found a way to get it.
That's good. If you can get it to me, maybe I can get to Simmons.
Exacto. So go, but stay close.
Hey! New Girl! You get any slower, you're going in the crusher. I don't trust them.
I always thought Virgil was skimming. Somebody has been stealing from me, so he dies, and now these guys show up?
You think they're taking over his old racket? So why send them on Virgil's run? 'Cause you want to find proof.
No, I want you to find proof.
I thought you said I could crash here.
Yeah. Not during operation. Come on.
